destinationAccountCode.description: The code of the beneficiary account.

destinationAccountHolderCode.description: The code of the beneficiary Account Holder.

invalidFields.description: A listing of the invalid fields which have caused the Setup Beneficiary request to fail. If this is empty, the Setup Beneficiary request has succeeded.

merchantReference.description: The reference provided by the merchant.

sourceAccountCode.description: The code of the benefactor account.

sourceAccountHolderCode.description: The code of the benefactor Account Holder.

transferDate.description: The date on which the beneficiary was set up and funds transferred from benefactor to beneficiary.
